revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-2-075

A circular lens (in sense 1 of 2-2-010), or part thereof, usually plano-convex or double convex in section, the optical axis (2-2-110) of which coincides with the optical axis of the prismatic lens of which it forms a part.
